scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field5] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] User-Agent: pqrxyz CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:00";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e29-89ad-f8a0-1762-4e2a9b52e4df123e>";reg-id=1, <sip:[field0]abcde@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:05";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e32-89adf-f8aap0-17623-4e2a9b572e4df123e>";reg-id=1 Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: eventlist,feature-ref,replaces,tdialog Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] User-Agent: pqrxyz CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:00";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e29-89ad-f8a0-1762-4e2a9b52e4df123e>";reg-id=1, <sip:[field0]abcde@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:05";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e32-89adf-f8aap0-17623-4e2a9b572e4df123e>";reg-id=1 Max-Forwards: 70 Authorization: Digest realm="hautelook.local",nonce="16d6523f8425d0d479e886d8de76a0112f8f452162f",uri="sips:hautelook.local",opaque="1234567890abcedef",qop=auth,response="038bc7b1f8656a106fcaa7c4cf2c0fca",username="11006002532",cnonce="0a4f113b",nc=00000001 Supported: eventlist,feature-ref,replaces,tdialog Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: avaya-cm-feature-status Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: pqrxyz Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: message-summary Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: pqrxyz Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: avaya-ccs-profile Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: pqrxyz Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: dialog Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: pqrxyz Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[field0]@[field2];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[field6] From: <sip:[field0]@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field2]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 5 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: reg Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: pqrxyz Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:6025 SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number][pid] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE User-Agent: pqrxyz Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:00";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e29-89ad-f8a0-1762-4e2a9b52e4df123e>";reg-id=1, <sip:[field0]abcde@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];avaya-sc-enabled>;q=1;expires=120;+avaya.gmtoffset="0:05";+avaya.js-ver="1.0";+avaya.model="n/a";+avaya.sn="n/a";+avaya.firmware="n/a";+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:0da99e32-89adf-f8aap0-17623-4e2a9b572e4df123e>";reg-id=1 Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number][pid] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number][pid] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
